LanguageData.AirConditioning.description: Build Wattz heaters and Appalachia Freeze coolers to keep rooms livable in any season, or to maintain proper freezer temperatures.
LanguageData.AtmosphericHeater.description: Build compact Poseidon home reactors that burn bioferrite and drive enormous amounts of heat into the surrounding air.
LanguageData.AtmosphericHeater.label: Poseidon home reactor
LanguageData.Batteries.description: Develop Poseidon battery banks for storing reserve grid power with the sort of reassuring pre-War safety language that usually meant the opposite.
LanguageData.BioferriteGenerator.description: Build power generators that burn bioferrite as a fuel. Bioferrite keeps its own identity here, but the hardware around it can still read like a desperate late-era Poseidon project.
LanguageData.BiofuelRefining.description: Build refinery equipment that converts biological feedstock into oil for generators, burners, and industrial systems.
LanguageData.DeepDrilling.description: Build Corvega deep drills for extracting resources from underground. You will still need a ground-penetrating scanner to find the best seams.
LanguageData.FlatscreenTelevision.description: Produce Radiation King flatscreen televisions for greater comfort and entertainment.
LanguageData.HospitalBed.description: Construct Med-Tek hospital beds that improve medical outcomes and turn a rough frontier ward into something closer to a pre-War clinic.
LanguageData.MicroelectronicsBasics.description: Work with advanced microelectronics, unlocking Wattz utility electronics, Radiation King entertainment systems, and more sophisticated industrial control equipment.
LanguageData.NutrientPaste.description: Build industrial food dispensers that turn organic feedstocks into edible paste with efficient, relentlessly impersonal pre-War engineering.
LanguageData.SolarPanels.description: Build Poseidon Civilian Helios Two solar panels for domestic and settlement-scale electricity generation.
LanguageData.SolarPanels.label: Civilian Helios Two
LanguageData.TubeTelevision.description: Produce Radiation King tube televisions for recreational watching and proper retro-futurist living room culture.
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedBatteries.description: Develop pre-War Poseidon battery units capable of storing large amounts of energy with minimal loss.
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedPowerSources.description: Recover advanced Poseidon generation hardware, including solar arrays, hydro units, and high-capacity turbine systems.
LanguageData.VFE_BasicFactories.description: Construct basic Corvega works, including conveyors, underground transfer points, and factory hoppers for automating routine industrial tasks around the colony.
LanguageData.VFE_BasicFactories.label: Corvega basic works
LanguageData.VFE_ComplexFactories.description: Construct specialized Corvega factory systems capable of manufacturing components, producing alloy stock, and handling other advanced automated production jobs.
LanguageData.VFE_ComplexFactories.label: Corvega advanced works
LanguageData.VFE_IndustrialGenerators.description: Develop heavy-duty Poseidon generator systems built to store more fuel and feed more power into the grid.
LanguageData.VFE_Manufacturing.description: Establish larger Corvega production benches and powered industrial work centers for high-throughput fabrication, assembly, and finishing.
LanguageData.VFE_Manufacturing.label: Corvega manufacturing
LanguageData.VFE_NuclearPower.description: Restore the harshest end of the pre-War power ladder: compact reactor systems with enormous output and equally severe failure risks.
LanguageData.VFE_TidalPower.description: Build Poseidon tidal generators on open water to supply steady industrial power from current and surf.
LanguageData.VHGE_GasExtraction.description: Research propane deposits and the pipe-fed burner systems that let it function as a compact industrial fuel.
LanguageData.VHGE_GasExtraction.label: propane extraction
LanguageData.VitalsMonitor.description: Develop Med-Tek patient telemetry rigs that improve surgery outcomes and long-term recovery when mounted beside a hospital bed.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_BasicRecycling.description: Develop basic waste recovery systems for turning toxic refuse into usable industrial feedstock.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_BasicRecycling.label: Poseidon waste recovery
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_ComplexRecycling.description: Expand waste recovery into sealed reclamation lines for alloy, isotope, and compacted refuse products.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_ComplexRecycling.label: Poseidon advanced reclamation
LanguageData.VTE_HVAC.description: Build a reliable climate-control system connecting Wattz control hardware to Appalachia Freeze cooling equipment and related ventilation components.
LanguageData.WatermillGenerator.description: Build Poseidon hydro generators on rivers to generate a steady supply of power.
